ddls:
CREATE TABLE "electoral_divisions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral division */,
  "elect_div" TEXT /* Name of the electoral division */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or territory where the electoral division is located */,
  "numccds" INTEGER /* Number of CCDs (Commonwealth Electoral Divisions) in the electoral division */,
  "electoral_division_type" TEXT /* Type of electoral division (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the electoral division was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the electoral division was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electoral_divisions_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state or territory */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state or territory */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state or territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic data entry */,
  "elect_div_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electoral division the data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the electoral division */,
  "over_18" INTEGER /* Number of people over 18 in the electoral division */,
  "area_sqkm" REAL /* Area of the electoral division in square kilometers */,
  "boundary_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the electoral division boundary (e.g., polygon, rectangle) */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the electoral division boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_data_elect_div_id FOREIGN KEY ("elect_div_id") REFERENCES electoral_divisions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "elect_div_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electoral division the data belongs to */,
  "actual" INTEGER /* Actual population of the electoral division */,
  "projected" INTEGER /* Projected population of the electoral division */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the electoral division */,
  "projected_growth_rate" REAL /* Projected growth rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_elect_div_id FOREIGN KEY ("elect_div_id") REFERENCES electoral_divisions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "elect_div_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electoral division the data belongs to */,
  "long_c" REAL /* Longitude of the electoral division */,
  "lat_c" REAL /* Latitude of the electoral division */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population in the electoral division */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Income distribution of the population in the electoral division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_elect_div_id FOREIGN KEY ("elect_div_id") REFERENCES electoral_divisions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_events" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the electoral event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the electoral event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of electoral event (e.g., federal election, state election, local election) */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout for the electoral event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boundary_changes" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary change entry */,
  "elect_div_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electoral division that changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the boundary change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the boundary change */,
  "change_reason_code" TEXT /* Code explaining the reason for the boundary change */,
  "change_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the boundary change takes effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boundary_changes_elect_div_id FOREIGN KEY ("elect_div_id") REFERENCES electoral_divisions ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date the data was sourced */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
